name.ja: ベリーフレッシュ・コラボレーション

requirement.en: During the turn you Normal Summoned this card, send 1 other card from your hand or field to the Graveyard.

effect.en: Change 1 Attack Position monster on your field to face-up Defense Position. Then, if you sent a WATER Attribute Aqua Type monster to the Graveyard to meet the requirement, you can destroy 1 face-up Level 10 or lower non-Maximum Monster on your opponent's field. This turn, you can only attack with Aqua Type monsters.
